## Checklist

- [ ] Edited `registry/*.yaml` (not the generated static files directly)
- [ ] Ran `npm run generate-static` to regenerate static files
- [ ] Ran `npm run generate-static:check` to verify files are in sync
- [ ] Ran `npm run ci` and all checks pass
- [ ] Model IDs follow `{provider}-{model}-{variant}` naming convention
- [ ] Pricing data has a verifiable source (linked in `pricingUrl`)
